rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE binary expressions by ensuring left and right sides match in type.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by tracing unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers on the same line.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in the same annex.
Ensure type consistency in equality and comparison expressions: bool, int, and real types must align with their usage.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes, to avoid scope-related diagnostics.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use valid AADL feature names and avoid package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare types explicitly using int, real, or bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not defined in the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
